---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ALPHANSO
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address. Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work. Include any API design ideas, configuration options, or references to similar tools.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots here.
